name: componentry-letter-cascade
title: Letter Cascade
author: Harsh Jadhav
description: Flips a text label through staggered front and echo faces on hover, focus, or keyboard activation.

changes: Repointed the utility import; added click, touch, focus, and keyboard activation, a reduced-motion path, code-point splitting, and hidden duplicate visual glyphs.

modifications.change: Repointed the utility import; added click, touch, focus, and keyboard activation, a reduced-motion path, code-point splitting, and hidden duplicate visual glyphs.
modifications.reason: Keep the upstream cascade available beyond hover while exposing the label only once to assistive technology.
